heading: Misbranded tobacco products
label: 387c Misbranded tobacco products

Effective Date, (6), , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–31, div. A, title I, § 103(q)(5)123 Stat. 1840June 22, 2009“(5).—Package label requirementsThe package label requirements of paragraphs (3) and (4) of section 903(a) of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act [] (as amended by this division) shall take effect on the date that is 12 months after the date of enactment of this Act []. The package label requirements of paragraph (2) of such section 903(a) for cigarettes shall take effect on the date that is 15 months after the issuance of the regulations required by section 4(d) of the Federal Cigarette Labeling and Advertising Act ([(d)]), as amended by section 201 of this division. The package label requirements of paragraph (2) of such section 903(a) for tobacco products other than cigarettes shall take effect on the date that is 12 months after the date of enactment of this Act. The effective date shall be with respect to the date of manufacture, provided that, in any case, beginning 30 days after such effective date, a manufacturer shall not introduce into the domestic commerce of the United States any product, irrespective of the date of manufacture, that is not in conformance with section 903(a)(2), (3), and (4) and section 920(a) of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act [].21 U.S.C. 387c(a)15 U.S.C. 133321 U.S.C. 387t(a)June 22, 2009“(6).—Advertising requirementsThe advertising requirements of section 903(a)(8) of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act [] (as amended by this division) shall take effect on the date that is 12 months after the date of enactment of this Act [].”21 U.S.C. 387c(a)(8)June 22, 2009

children.text: if its labeling is false or misleading in any particular;

children.label: A
children.text: the name and place of business of the tobacco product manufacturer, packer, or distributor;

children.label: B
children.text: an accurate statement of the quantity of the contents in terms of weight, measure, or numerical count;

children.label: C
children.text: an accurate statement of the percentage of the tobacco used in the product that is domestically grown tobacco and the percentage that is foreign grown tobacco; and

children.label: D
children.text: the statement required under ,section 387t(a) of this title

if any word, statement, or other information required by or under authority of this subchapter to appear on the label or labeling is not prominently placed thereon with such conspicuousness (as compared with other words, statements, or designs in the labeling) and in such terms as to render it likely to be read and understood by the ordinary individual under customary conditions of purchase and use;
if it has an established name, unless its label bears, to the exclusion of any other nonproprietary name, its established name prominently printed in type as required by the Secretary by regulation;

if the Secretary has issued regulations requiring that its labeling bear adequate directions for use, or adequate warnings against use by children, that are necessary for the protection of users unless its labeling conforms in all respects to such regulations;

if it was manufactured, prepared, propagated, compounded, or processed in an establishment not duly registered under section 387e(b), 387e(c), 387e(d), or 387e(h) of this title, if it was not included in a list required by , if a notice or other information respecting it was not provided as required by such section or , or if it does not bear such symbols from the uniform system for identification of tobacco products prescribed under as the Secretary by regulation requires;section 387e(i) of this titlesection 387e(j) of this titlesection 387e(e) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: its advertising is false or misleading in any particular; or

children.label: B
children.text: it is sold or distributed in violation of or of regulations prescribed under ;section 387f(d)(5) of this titlesection 387f(d) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a true statement of the tobacco product’s established name as described in paragraph (4), printed prominently; and

children.label: i
children.text: the uses of the tobacco product and relevant warnings, precautions, side effects, and contraindications; and

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of specific tobacco products made subject to a finding by the Secretary after notice and opportunity for comment that such action is appropriate to protect the public health, a full description of the components of such tobacco product or the formula showing quantitatively each ingredient of such tobacco product to the extent required in regulations which shall be issued by the Secretary after an opportunity for a hearing;
if it is a tobacco product subject to a tobacco product standard established under , unless it bears such labeling as may be prescribed in such tobacco product standard; orsection 387g of this title

children.label: A
children.text: to comply with any requirement prescribed under section 387d or 387h of this title; or

children.label: B
children.text: to furnish any material or information required under .section 387i of this title

children.heading: Prior approval of label statements
children.label: b Prior approval of label statements
children.text: The Secretary may, by regulation, require prior approval of statements made on the label of a tobacco product to ensure that such statements do not violate the misbranding provisions of subsection (a) and that such statements comply with other provisions of the Family Smoking Prevention and Tobacco Control Act (including the amendments made by such Act). No regulation issued under this subsection may require prior approval by the Secretary of the content of any advertisement, except for modified risk tobacco products as provided in . No advertisement of a tobacco product published after , shall, with respect to the language of label statements as prescribed under and or the regulations issued under such sections, be subject to the provisions of sections 52 through 55 of title 15.section 387k of this titlesection 1333 of title 15section 4402 of title 15June 22, 2009
